title: handoffctl2 handoff frontmatter
description: YAML frontmatter of a handoff Markdown file — the ONLY machine metadata for the contract (no sidecars). Values like tier and gate ids are cross-checked against routes.toml / project.toml by lint, not by this schema.

tier.description: Carver-stamped capability tier (ladder key in routes.toml). Never a CLI or provider name.

stack.description: Sugar: exclusive implies the project's stack mutex; readonly implies reader-slot accounting if the project declares it.

mutexes.description: Named serialize groups from project.toml (replaces pairwise Serialize-with).

depends_on.description: Task ids and/or decision ids (D-0XX). A decision hold blocks dispatch like an unmerged dependency.

after.description: Task id that must be merged first (prose 'main after P53 merge', typed)

input_revision.description: Commit of the spec/roadmap snapshot the carve was written against; staleness forces re-carve.

session.description: Cache-reuse policy: fresh, or resume:<area-affinity-key> (runtime session ids live in the statefile, never here).

advances.description: Roadmap/milestone criterion ids this package is expected to newly satisfy — the progress-ratchet input, verified by the reviewer at merge.

negative.description: The case that violates the bound/contract and its asserted outcome — mechanism, not constant.

gate.description: Declared project gate id this oracle runs under. Executable by the implementer (lint L6).

gates.description: Project gate ids (project.toml). Free-text shell is rejected.

escalate_if.description: Mechanical triggers only (lint L8): named contract unmet, forbidden file needed, threshold exceeded → BLOCKED exit.

carve_affinity.description: Hint: follow-up carving may reuse the reviewing session's warm context (v2 §2).
